prompt: A luminous anime-style summer portrait of a Japanese high school girl shown from the chest up in side profile, standing outdoors under an intense blue sky with bright white clouds. She has a short wet bob haircut in dark navy black, large sparkling blue-violet eyes, soft blush on her cheeks, and a calm, slightly distant expression. Her white sailor school uniform shirt is soaked and semi-translucent, clinging realistically to the fabric folds, with a deep navy sailor collar and a large navy ribbon at the chest. She raises one arm and presses a clear ridged plastic water bottle against her forehead, with cold water droplets running down her face, neck, arm, and clothing. The scene is filled with strong summer sunlight, glossy highlights, rim light through damp hair strands, rainbow lens flares, tiny floating bubbles, and glittering reflections. In the background, include a softly blurred outdoor school pool area with metal railings, a pool ladder, and shimmering water. Emphasize crystalline transparency in the bottle, wet skin sheen, delicate eyelashes, detailed anime rendering, dramatic backlighting, refreshing heat-of-summer atmosphere, and a polished high-end illustration style.
